title: Our Contact Terminal
description: Get in touch with Financial Edge - Nigeria's most reliable financial newsletter.
html:
Contact Us

Financial Edge is Nigeria's most reliable financial newsletter, providing real-time intelligence across sectors including Capital Market, Money Market, Energy, Agro Business, and more.

General Inquiries

Email: fosety@yahoo.com

Phone: +234 803 440 2525

Editorial Team

For press releases, story tips, and editorial inquiries, please contact our newsroom.

Email: editor@financialedge.com.ng

Advertising & Partnerships

For advertising opportunities and business partnerships, contact our business development team.

Email: partnerships@financialedge.com.ng

Office Location

Financial Edge
Nigeria

Connect With Us

Follow us on social media for the latest updates:

  • Facebook
  • X (Twitter)
  • YouTube
  • TikTok

We aim to respond to all inquiries within 24-48 hours during business days.
